title: Red String
description: You can't be trapped by tripwire hook with string anymore
body:
This resource pack will colour the string (tripwire) red when it placed. You now can see the string clearly and cannot be trapped by tripwire hook trap.

I don't have chance for testing the new version of this resource pack, if there is any issues, please report here : https://github.com/break08/red-string/issues and you can also try download tested older versions (which doesn't support many versions of minecraft).


<details>
<summary>If errors happened, try to...</summary>

Go to .zip file of resource pack -> pack.mcmeta

**Method 1**: In pack.mcmeta, remove 

        "supported_formats": {

            "min_inclusive": x,

            "max_inclusive": x

        }

and remove the `,` from description line
        
**Method 2**: Remove 

    "meta": {

        "game_version": "x"

    }

and remove `,` next to `}` above these removed lines

**Method 3**: Do both Method 1 and 2

**Method 4**: Report issues for me and use one of these versions:

![Stable version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13eeed252cab5f13b7c7cd6fec76ddf40b29599.png)


</details>

**Before using this:**

![You can't see anything](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y3xe9ONo/images/8b2e476b39587407e18196fb4281b28e08caddb1.png)

**After using this resource pack:**

![Now you can see the string](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y3xe9ONo/images/491e2bd6ff441402acb223337da25e52d741e223.png)

Try my other resource packs:

**1**. [Lined Redstone](https://modrinth.com/project/6M5wtKRm) - Replace the vanilla dusty redstone lines with straight-line designed redstone

**2**. [Mark the Powder Snow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mark-the-powder-snow) - Border the powder snow blocks and help you to avoid falling into them

and mods =):

**1**. [New NameTag Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-nametag-recipe) - Backport the Name Tag recipe of Minecraft 26.1
